# Config changes while a pending change exists: a pending non-voter addition
# gets enacted via a store-leaseholder-msg with an updated config, revealing
# that more non-voters are still needed.

set-store quiet=true
  store-id=1 node-id=1 locality-tiers=zone=a
  store-id=2 node-id=2 locality-tiers=zone=b
  store-id=3 node-id=3 locality-tiers=zone=c
  store-id=4 node-id=4 locality-tiers=zone=d
  store-id=5 node-id=5 locality-tiers=zone=e
----

# 3-voter range, config says 3 → no repair.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    config=num_replicas=3
----

repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair

# Add a pending non-voter on s4 (anticipating a config change).
make-pending-changes range-id=1
  add-replica: add-store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
----
pending(1)
change-id=1 store-id=4 node-id=4 range-id=1 load-delta=[cpu:0s/s, write-bandwidth:0 B/s, byte-size:0 B] start=0s gc=5m0s
  prev=(replica-id=none type=VOTER_FULL)
  next=(replica-id=unknown type=NON_VOTER)

# Suppressed by pending change.
repair-needed
----
no ranges need repair

# store-leaseholder-msg with updated config (num_replicas=5 num_voters=3)
# and s4 added as non-voter (enacts pending change). Still need 1 more
# non-voter.
store-leaseholder-msg
store-id=1
  range-id=1
    store-id=1 type=VOTER_FULL leaseholder=true
    store-id=2 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=3 type=VOTER_FULL
    store-id=4 type=NON_VOTER
    config=num_replicas=5 num_voters=3
----

repair-needed
----
AddNonVoter: r1
